description: Update 6 plugin icons from all-black Simple Icons to their official brand colors: airtable (#18BFFF), asana (#F06A6A), calendly (#006BFF), clickhouse (#FFCC01), clickup (#7B68EE), leetcode (#FFA116).
qualityChecks: cd plugins/airtable && npm run build && cd ../asana && npm run build && cd ../calendly && npm run build && cd ../clickhouse && npm run build && cd ../clickup && npm run build && cd ../leetcode && npm run build

userStories.title: Update airtable icon to brand color #18BFFF
userStories.description: Change the fill color in plugins/airtable/icon.svg from black to the official Airtable brand color #18BFFF.
acceptanceCriteria: plugins/airtable/icon.svg contains fill="#18BFFF" instead of fill="black"
No other changes to the SVG structure or path data
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/airtable/icon.svg (change fill color)

Context:
The icon is from Simple Icons and currently uses an all-black fill. The official Airtable brand color from Simple Icons is #18BFFF.

Changes:
In plugins/airtable/icon.svg, change `fill="black"` to `fill="#18BFFF"`. The current SVG content is:
```
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M11.992 1.966c-.434 0-.87.086-1.28.257L1.779 5.917c-.503.208-.49.908.012 1.116l8.982 3.558a3.266 3.266 0 0 0 2.454 0l8.982-3.558c.503-.196.503-.908.012-1.116l-8.957-3.694a3.255 3.255 0 0 0-1.272-.257zM23.4 8.056a.589.589 0 0 0-.222.045l-10.012 3.877a.612.612 0 0 0-.38.564v8.896a.6.6 0 0 0 .821.552L23.62 18.1a.583.583 0 0 0 .38-.551V8.653a.6.6 0 0 0-.6-.596zM.676 8.095a.644.644 0 0 0-.48.19C.086 8.396 0 8.53 0 8.69v8.355c0 .442.515.737.908.54l6.27-3.006.307-.147 2.969-1.436c.466-.22.43-.908-.061-1.092L.883 8.138a.57.57 0 0 0-.207-.044z" fill="black"/></svg>
```

Change only `fill="black"` to `fill="#18BFFF"` on the path element.

Constraints:
- Do NOT modify the path data, viewBox, or any other SVG attributes
- Do NOT add width/height attributes
- Do NOT create or modify icon-dark.svg (the auto-generation handles dark mode)

userStories.title: Update calendly icon to brand color #006BFF

acceptanceCriteria: plugins/calendly/icon.svg contains fill="#006BFF" on the path element instead of fill="black"
No other changes to the SVG structure or path data
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/calendly/icon.svg (change fill color)

Context:
The icon is from Simple Icons and currently uses fill="black" on the path element. The SVG element itself has fill="none". The official Calendly brand color from Simple Icons is #006BFF.

Changes:
In plugins/calendly/icon.svg, change `fill="black"` to `fill="#006BFF"` on the <path> element. The current SVG content is:
```
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M19.655 14.262c.281 0 ..." fill="black"/></svg>
```

Change only the path's `fill="black"` to `fill="#006BFF"`. Keep `fill="none"` on the <svg> element unchanged.

Constraints:
- Do NOT modify the path data, viewBox, or <svg> fill="none"
- Do NOT add width/height attributes
- Do NOT create or modify icon-dark.svg

```
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path fill="black" d="M13.483 0a1.374 1.374 0 0 0-.961.438L7.116 6.226l-3.854 4.126a5.266 5.266 0 0 0-1.209 2.104 ..."/></svg>
```
